privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real-world server metric data downloaded from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) repository via GitHub (specifically the realAWSCloudwatch and realKnownCause subsets). The agent must construct a Graphite dashboard named 'NOC Triage Board' containing three specifically titled graphs ('Hottest Servers', 'Temperature Alert Zone', 'Sorted Disk Activity') using various Graphite metric functions like highestCurrent, threshold, sortByMaxima, and aliasByNode. All requirements detailed in the metadata exactly match the explicit verifier.py evaluation logic and export script processes.
